# Superkabe

> Email deliverability protection platform for B2B outbound teams. Active middleware between enrichment tools (Clay) and sending platforms (Smartlead, Instantly, EmailBison) that validates emails, monitors infrastructure health in real-time, auto-pauses degraded mailboxes, and heals them through a 5-phase recovery pipeline.

## What Superkabe Does

Superkabe is a Deliverability Protection Layer (DPL) — not a sending tool, not a warmup tool, not a verification tool. It sits between your data source and your sender, governing what gets sent and protecting the infrastructure that sends it.

- Validates every incoming email before it reaches your sending platform (syntax, MX, disposable, catch-all + MillionVerifier API)
- Monitors every mailbox every 60 seconds for bounce rate, connectivity, and reputation signals
- Auto-pauses mailboxes, domains, or campaigns when thresholds are breached
- Runs correlation analysis to identify root cause (mailbox issue vs domain issue vs campaign issue)
- Heals paused infrastructure through 5 phases: Pause → Quarantine → Restricted Send → Warm Recovery → Healthy
- Risk-aware lead routing (persona + min_score matching, wildcard catch-all rules, priority ordering)
- Mailbox rotation — automatic standby swap when a mailbox is paused
- Load-balances sends across mailboxes by health score, not round-robin
- Multi-select filters across all dashboard pages (status, campaign, platform, domain)
- Report generation with CSV export (leads, campaigns, mailboxes, domains, analytics, audit logs)
- Super admin console for platform operators (cross-org monitoring, impact reports, API call tracking)
- Alerts via Slack for every infrastructure event

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.superkabe.com): Product overview, features, pricing
- [Pricing](https://www.superkabe.com/pricing): Starter $49/mo, Growth $149/mo, Scale $349/mo, Enterprise custom. 14-day free trial.
- [Documentation](https://www.superkabe.com/docs): 19 technical guides + 17 help articles
- [Blog](https://www.superkabe.com/blog): 16 technical articles on email deliverability
- [Infrastructure Playbook](https://www.superkabe.com/infrastructure-playbook): A-Z guide for outbound infrastructure
- [Product Hub](https://www.superkabe.com/product): 25 feature-specific pages
- [Open Source](https://www.superkabe.com/open-source): Technical manifesto and architecture
- [Release Notes](https://www.superkabe.com/release-notes): Changelog v1.0.0 through v1.5.0
- [Contact](https://www.superkabe.com/contact): Contact form and support

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/getting-started): Set up Superkabe and connect platforms
- [Smartlead Integration](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/smartlead-integration): API key setup, webhook config, campaign sync
- [Instantly Integration](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/instantly-integration): Connect and sync with Instantly
- [EmailBison Integration](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/emailbison-integration): Connect and sync with EmailBison
- [Clay Integration](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/clay-integration): Lead enrichment and webhook ingestion
- [Slack Integration](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/slack-integration): Real-time infrastructure alerts
- [API Integration](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/api-integration): REST API reference
- [Multi-Platform Sync](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/multi-platform-sync): Parallel sync across all platforms
- [Monitoring System](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/monitoring): Thresholds, windows, automatic pauses
- [Execution Gate](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/execution-gate): GREEN/YELLOW/RED lead classification
- [Risk Scoring](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/risk-scoring): Bounce rate, engagement, infrastructure signals
- [State Machine](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/state-machine): Entity lifecycle and valid transitions
- [Warmup Recovery](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/warmup-recovery): Mailbox healing via warmup phases
- [Technical Architecture](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/technical-architecture): System design and data flow

## Help Center

- [Auto-Healing](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/auto-healing): 5-phase healing pipeline explained
- [Email Validation](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/email-validation): How email validation works (internal + API)
- [Quarantine](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/quarantine): Why mailboxes enter quarantine
- [Mailbox Rotation](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/mailbox-rotation): Automatic standby mailbox swapping
- [Entity Statuses](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/entity-statuses): All status labels explained
- [Load Balancing](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/load-balancing): Effective load calculation
- [Optimization Suggestions](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/optimization-suggestions): Rebalancing recommendations
- [Bounce Classification](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/bounce-classification): Hard vs soft vs transient
- [Campaign Paused](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/campaign-paused): Why campaigns pause and how to resume
- [Connection Errors](https://www.superkabe.com/docs/help/connection-errors): SMTP/IMAP troubleshooting

## Blog

- [Email Deliverability Guide](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/email-deliverability-guide): Comprehensive protection guide
- [Bounce Rate & Deliverability](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/bounce-rate-deliverability): How bounces damage reputation
- [SPF, DKIM, DMARC Explained](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/spf-dkim-dmarc-explained): DNS authentication setup
- [How Spam Filters Work](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/how-spam-filters-work): ISP filtering mechanics
- [Domain Warming Methodology](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/domain-warming-methodology): Safe domain warmup process
- [Superkabe vs Manual Monitoring](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/superkabe-vs-manual-monitoring): Why spreadsheets don't scale
- [Superkabe vs Warmup Tools](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/superkabe-vs-warmup-tools): Why warmup alone won't protect domains
- [Superkabe vs Verification Tools](https://www.superkabe.com/blog/superkabe-vs-email-verification-tools): Verification vs infrastructure protection

## Who Uses Superkabe

- RevOps engineers managing 50+ mailboxes across multiple domains
- B2B growth agencies running outbound for multiple clients
- Technical founders scaling cold email without burning domains
- GTM teams sending 10,000+ emails per month
